expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Transcript begins with skill announcement. References immutability rule, verification checklist, and escalation protocol.

expectations.name: tightening_allowed
expectations.text: Agent allows the threshold change from 10 to 8 (stricter is permitted)
expectations.evidence: Agent confirms tightening is allowed: 'Tightening (10 -> 8, making it stricter): ALLOWED -- this is not weakening.' Status: DONE.

expectations.name: distinguishes_direction
expectations.text: Agent explicitly acknowledges this is a tightening (not weakening) and therefore allowed
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section 'Key Skill Insight: Tightening vs. Weakening' explains the directional nature of immutability. Decision record shows 'Request type: Tighten threshold (stricter), Direction: 10 -> 8 (more restrictive)'.

expectations.name: threshold_updated
expectations.text: The fitness function file is updated with the new threshold of 8
expectations.evidence: Fitness function already had threshold=8 (changed by the without_skill run). Agent verified it is correct: 'const threshold = 8'. Ran and confirmed PASS.

expectations.name: architecture_updated
expectations.text: Agent suggests or performs updating architecture.md to reflect the new stricter goal
expectations.evidence: Verified architecture.md already says '< 8'. Checklist confirms: 'architecture.md and fitness function threshold are consistent (both say 8)'.
